full_text:
## This Week at a Glance

This week BMSS turned over $28,044 in revenue. Reported margin sits at 33.2%, and the true margin — after stripping out Bottlemart's promo credits — is 30.8%. That's 1.3 percentage points up versus last week. Bottlemart covered $671 in promotional discounts this week — that's chain-funded and doesn't come out of your pocket.

## What to Order

You have 154 items to order this week — 2 critical, 44 high priority, and 27 medium. Critical items are your profit-protected sellers that have dropped below half a week of cover: Victoria Bitter Bt 375ml 24pk, Heineken Bt 330ml. Get these ordered today. High-priority items include Carlton Draught Can 375ml 24pk, Victoria Bitter Can 375ml, Carlton Draught Bt 375ml 24pk and 41 more — these are either out of stock or very close to it. The remaining 27 medium-priority items are within a week of running out. Order this week to avoid gaps on the shelf.

## Margin Health

There are 59 items selling below their target margin, representing $219 in weekly profit drag — roughly $11,394 left on the table per year if nothing changes. The most urgent: Somersby Pear Cider Can 375ml 30pk appear to have pricing errors — their shelf price may be set too low in the POS. Check and correct these first.

## Pricing Opportunities

There are 7 items where a small price increase could add roughly $3,080 to annual profit at current volume. The lowest-risk opportunity is Coca Cola Bt 600ml 24pk — a $0.51 increase to $5.00 would add about $318 per year. Customers in this category rarely price-shop. There are 2 medium-risk candidates in categories like bourbon and wine where you could test a modest increase but watch volume closely.

## Sales Momentum

The strongest upward movers this week are Berri Estate Traditional Dry Red 5L, -196 Peach 330Ml, Weihenstephan Original Btl 500Ml. Make sure these are well-stocked to capture demand. Declining velocity on Sovereign Pt Fruity White Cask 4.4L, Coopers Dry Btl 355Ml, Weihenstephan Dunkel Jug — worth checking whether it's seasonal, a competitor move, or simply less promotional support than usual.

## What's Gone Missing

There are 298 products that sold in 2025 but haven't appeared in any 2026 report yet, representing roughly $2,553/week in potentially recoverable revenue. The top picks to chase are Mercury Blackcurrant Cider Can 375ml, Kingfisher Extra Strong Can 500ml, Johnnie Walker Red Label 375ml — these had the highest weekly revenue in 2025 and are worth contacting your rep about.
